heading: Command of documented vessels
label: 12131 Command of documented vessels
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)1213146:12110(d).

Amendments2025—Subsec. (a). inserted “or noncitizen national (as such term is described in section 308 of the Immigration and Nationality Act ())” after “citizen”.Pub. L. 119–608 U.S.C. 14082008—Subsec. (a). substituted “command” for “commmand”.Pub. L. 110–181
amendments: Amendments2025—Subsec. (a). inserted “or noncitizen national (as such term is described in section 308 of the Immigration and Nationality Act ())” after “citizen”.Pub. L. 119–608 U.S.C. 14082008—Subsec. (a). substituted “command” for “commmand”.Pub. L. 110–181

children.heading: .—In General
children.label: a .—In General
children.text: Except as provided in subsection (b), a documented vessel may be placed under the command only of a citizen or noncitizen national (as such term is described in section 308 of the Immigration and Nationality Act ()) of the United States.8 U.S.C. 1408
a vessel with only a recreational endorsement; or
an unmanned barge operating outside of the territorial waters of the United States.
